intro: Notosceptrum andongense, also known as the Andong gentian, is a type of flowering plant in the Gentianaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in Vietnamese medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in treating various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Notosceptrum andongense include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and iridoid glycosides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
